server_error_desc: The server is experiencing issues. Please try again later.
network_error_desc: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
too_many_requests_desc: Please wait before reloading the page. The server is under heavy load.
server_overloaded_desc: Please try again in a few seconds.
request_timeout_desc: The request took too long. Please check your connection.
network_error_fallback: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
server_load_fallback: The server is under heavy load. Please try again later.
permission_denied: You do not have permission to access.
server_error_page: An error occurred on the server
